org.drip.measure.distribution

org.drip.measure.gaussian

org.drip.portfolioconstruction.bayesian

    Subclasses of BoundedManifold in org.drip.numerical.rdintegration
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  RectangularManifold
    RectangularManifold holds a Rectangular Quadrature Manifold corresponding to an Integration of Rd to R1 Objective Function.

    Modifier and Type Method Description

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    BlackLittermanCustomConfidenceOutput BlackLittermanCombinationEngine.customConfidenceRun​(BoundedManifold boundedManifold)
